name: Evermore Swirl
projectTitle: CO Accumulation Tool for a Closed Garage
description: This tool was developed as an accumulation model for carbon monoxide emissions in a closed garage under specified conditions.  It requires the user to input the garage volume, duration of vehicle idling, carbon monoxide emission rate, garage ventilation rate, and the initial carbon monoxide concentration.  Using these inputs, the model solves the mass balance equation and calculates the resulting concentration over time.  The outputs include the final carbon monoxide concentration after the specified duration as well as the estimated time required to reach selected health-based concentration thresholds.  All outputs are clearly labeled with appropriate units to ensure clarity and ease of interpretation for the user.
